eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Los Angeles, CA; at 10:25 AM ON MAY 5, 2026 Effective until 11:25 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a Required Weekly Test of the Emergency Alert System. This is only a test. No action is required. LA County Office of Emergency Management. Esta es una Prueba Mensual Requerida del Sistema de Alerta de Emergencia. Esto es solo una prueba. No se requiere ninguna accion.  Condado de Los Angeles.
